notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

Source directly supports孔日天's secret intent to kill萧炎 and frame包同. This is private knowledge known only to孔日天 and孔升天意志 (who is in his mind). Others (萧炎, 包同, 商心慈) are not aware of this plan. The fact is atomic and source-backed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
孔日天因升天真传被夺而仇恨商心慈，但暂时不能报复她，转而想杀其下属萧炎并栽赃给包同。源文本直接支持这一行为链。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains several individuals (萧炎, 包同, 孔日天, 商心慈) but the only named collective actors are 商家 (Shang family) and 南宫家族 (Nangong family). 萧炎 is a subordinate of 商家, but the conflict in this chapter is personal: 孔日天 (an individual, not a faction) wants to kill 萧炎 and frame 包同. 商心慈 is the clan head of 商家 and worries about 萧炎, but the threat is from an individual (孔日天), not a faction. 南宫家族 appears only in a relation about taking over 白鹤海域 after 秦百合's death, with 南宫远 gathering cranes — no faction pressure is evident from the seed facts. No collective actor has a concrete stake that rises to faction-level pressure in this seed.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
